tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import sqlite3, os
db = os.path.expanduser('~/data/memory/chroma.sqlite3')
conn = sqlite3.connect(db)
# Check collections
rows = conn.execute('SELECT id, name FROM collections').fetchall()
for r in rows:
    count = conn.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM embeddings WHERE collection_id=?', (r[0],)).fetchone()[0]
    print(f'Collection: {r[1]} (id={r[0]}), embeddings: {count}')
# Check queue
q = conn.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM embeddings_queue').fetchone()[0]
print(f'Queue: {q} entries')
conn.close()
"
tool_input.description: Check ChromaDB collections and queue status

tool_input.command: CD="$HOME/.claude" && OUT="$HOME/Desktop/Megaman-Framework-v2.4.5-Build-Guide.md" && embed_file() { local fp="$1"; local rp="${fp#$HOME/.claude/}"; local ext="${fp##*.}"; echo "" >> "$OUT"; echo "### \`$rp\`" >> "$OUT"; echo "" >> "$OUT"; case "$ext" in py) echo '```python' >> "$OUT" ;; json) echo '```json' >> "$OUT" ;; md) echo '```markdown' >> "$OUT" ;; *) echo '```' >> "$OUT" ;; esac; cat "$fp" >> "$OUT"; echo "" >> "$OUT"; echo '```' >> "$OUT"; echo "" >> "$OUT"; } && echo "# Megaman Framework v2.4.5 — Complete Build Guide (Full Code)" > "$OUT" && echo "" >> "$OUT" && echo "> Everything needed to rebuild this framework from scratch." >> "$OUT" && echo "> Every file included verbatim. No external deps beyond pip." >> "$OUT" && echo "" >> "$OUT" && echo "## Prerequisites" >> "$OUT" && echo '```' >> "$OUT" && echo "pip install chromadb mcp fastmcp" >> "$OUT" && echo '```' >> "$OUT" && echo "" >> "$OUT" && echo "## Directory Setup" >> "$OUT" && echo '```bash' >> "$OUT" && echo 'mkdir -p ~/.claude/{agents,rules,hooks/{gates,shared},skills/{fix,deploy,commit,build,test,review,refactor,document,profile,chain,wrap-up/scripts,status/scripts,web/scripts,browser,ralph,prp,loop,audit,deep-dive,analyze-errors,explore,research}}' >> "$OUT" && echo 'mkdir -p ~/data/memory' >> "$OUT" && echo '```' >> "$OUT" && echo "" >> "$OUT" && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 1. Configuration Files" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD/settings.json" "$CD/mcp.json" "$CD/CLAUDE.md"; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 2. Rules Files" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/rules/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 3. Agent Definitions" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/agents/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 4. Shared Modules" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/hooks/shared/*.py; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 5. Gate Modules" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/hooks/gates/gate_*.py; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 6. Hook Scripts" >> "$OUT" && for f in enforcer.py tracker.py boot.py session_end.py memory_server.py statusline.py auto_commit.py auto_approve.py user_prompt_capture.py subagent_context.py pre_compact.py event_logger.py; do [ -f "$CD/hooks/$f" ] && embed_file "$CD/hooks/$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 7. Test Suite" >> "$OUT" && [ -f "$CD/hooks/test_framework.py" ] && embed_file "$CD/hooks/test_framework.py" && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 8. Skills" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/skills/*/SKILL.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "## 9. Skill Scripts" >> "$OUT" && for f in "$CD"/skills/*/scripts/*.py; do [ -f "$f" ] && [[ "$f" != *__pycache__* ]] && embed_file "$f"; done && echo "---" >> "$OUT" && echo "*Full code dump — 2026-02-17*" >> "$OUT" && lines=$(wc -l < "$OUT") && size=$(du -h "$OUT" | cut -f1) && files=$(grep -c "^### " "$OUT") && echo "Done! $files files, $lines lines, $size"
tool_input.description: Generate build guide with all files embedded
